attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,INV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,Coalesce(SC_SNAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,Coalesce(SC_SNAP.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,SC_TV.BK_SALES_REP_NUM) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
,INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,BKGPDT.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,BKGPDT.PROCESS_DATE AS DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,Coalesce(SC_SNAP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE) AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,'FORWARD' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,INV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
--,DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
				
--,DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT


--,DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
--,DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT









--,DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT


--,DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT


--,DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT


--,DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT


--,DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT

,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY



,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY



--,DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
--,DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER               
,Current_Timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,Current_Timestamp(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL_DT                         
,BK_SS_CD       
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_EXTENDED_QTY*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_EXTENDED_QTY*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_EXTENDED_QTY

               
--,DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
--,GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT


   
--,GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT


,OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
--,DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT   
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT


 
--,DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT


--,DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT


--,SPLIT_PCT                     
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(INV.SPLIT_PCT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(INV.SPLIT_PCT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END SPLIT_PCT


,BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,DV_FMV_FLG                    
,DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
--,DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT



--,DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT


,BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,DSV_FLG                       
,DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,XCAT_FLG                      
,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,ELA_FLG                       
,ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
--,DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   
,CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE') THEN
			(DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT*SC_SNAP.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT )
ELSE 
				(DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT*(SC_TV.SPLIT_PCT/100)       ) END DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT



,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,POB_TYPE_CD                   
,NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   
,TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               
,ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
,MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,'Y' LAST_RECORD_FLG             
--,PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT  
,Coalesce(SC_SNAP.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,Coalesce(SC_SNAP.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,INV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
FROM
(SELECT PROCESS_DATE , FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL )  BKGPDT,
$$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SC_AGGR_XAAS INV
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_SMR_INCR SC_SNAP
ON SC_SNAP.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND  SC_SNAP.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    > 0
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRTREG_SNAP_XAAS_TV SC_TV
ON SC_TV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       =INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND SC_TV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0
AND Extract(YEAR From SC_TV.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM)='3500'
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
WHERE INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0

SELECT 
 INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,INV.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,INV.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
,INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,INV.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,INV.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,INV.GL_DT                         
,INV.BK_SS_CD                      
,INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,INV.TRANSACTION_DT                
,INV.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,INV.SPLIT_PCT                     
,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,INV.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,INV.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,INV.DSV_FLG                       
,INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,INV.XCAT_FLG                      
,INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,INV.ELA_FLG                       
,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   
,INV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,INV.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   
,INV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               
,INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
,INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,INV.LAST_RECORD_FLG AS LAST_RECORD_FLG              
,INV.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID         
,INV.SALES_MOTION_CD   
,INV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY     
,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */        
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE INV
WHERE INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','AR-OOD')
AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_SMR_INCR WI
WHERE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY > 0
)
AND INV.LAST_RECORD_FLG IN ('Y')  
AND INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999
AND INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY > 0

SELECT
INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
,INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,INV.PRODUCT_KEY
,INV.AR_TRX_KEY
,INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,INV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,INV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
,INV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER
,INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
,INV.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
,BKGPDT.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
,INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,INV.DD_GL_DATETIME
,INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD
,INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
,BKGPDT.PROCESS_DATE AS DV_FISCAL_DT
,INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD
,INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
,INV.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD
,INV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
,INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME
,INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
,'REVERSE' AS DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD
,INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
,INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG
,INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG
,INV.DV_MISC_FLG
,INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG
,INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
,INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
,INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT  * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * -1
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY * -1
,INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY   * -1
,INV.EDW_CREATE_USER
,INV.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,INV.EDW_UPDATE_USER
,INV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
,INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
,INV.GL_DT
,INV.BK_SS_CD
,INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * -1
,INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * -1
,INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
,INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
,INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
,INV.TRANSACTION_DT
,INV.GL_POSTED_DTM
,INV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT * -1
,INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT * -1
,INV.SPLIT_PCT * -1
,INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
,INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG
,INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID
,INV.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD
,INV.DV_FMV_FLG
,INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
